title: Police raid 15 locations in J&K's Baramulla; seize 'incriminating material' linked to banned outfit
description: Search operations were carried out at more than 15 locations including Jamia Qadeem, Naseem Bagh, Krankshivan, Tarzoo, Amargarh, Warpora, Bomai, Boitingoo and other areas of Sopore in north Kashmir
